status: COMPLETE — deep audit passed, all critical bugs fixed

bugs_found_and_fixed: BUG#1: String trim — tokenizer stripped whitespace from [...]
BUG#2: MULTISIG always FALSE — implemented n-of-k checking
BUG#3: Empty 0x hex literal — now throws parse error
BUG#4 (intentional): EXEC shares instruction counter — documented
BUG#5 (SECURITY): EXEC reset instruction counter — bypass of 1024 limit FIXED
BUG#6: Division by zero → Infinity — now throws runtime error
BUG#7: STATE(n) unset → throws — now returns 0 per Minima spec
BUG#8 (API): globals coercion — now accepts string/number, not just MiniValue

blocker: GitHub connector needs 'repo' scope to push
